attributes.description: Alerts when node free memory drops below 1 GB. Low memory risks OOM kills and fork failures.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Node free memory low

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise node free memory low

### What fired
Node free memory dropped below 1 GB during the window.

### Why it matters
Low free memory prevents persistence forks (copy-on-write needs headroom) and can lead to OOM kills.

### Triage
1. Check shard memory usage.
2. Inspect OS-level memory pressure.

### Remediation
- Rebalance shards.
- Grow node memory.

### Tuning
- 1 GB threshold; tune to node size.
